creator: randomnoise058@gmail.com
text: VBOX FBSD-11 with iSCSI and ZFS (on SATA) still operational after 28 hours of run time. So it appears that there is an issue with VirtualBox SCSI (LSIlogic/BUSlogic) drives in conjunction with iSCSI. I am not able at this point to test this with a physical FBSD.
